title: Lumi and the First Dream
cover_prompt: A small, glowing creature with silver-blue fur sits on a crescent moon, weaving starlight into delicate threads that drift down like fireflies over a sleeping village below. Soft watercolor hues of deep blues, purples, and warm golden glows create a dreamy, cozy night sky.
lyrics:
[verse]
Long before you were born
No dreams lit the sky
Only stars watched the world
With their quiet bright eye

[chorus]
Oh, that was the first dream
Soft as a sigh
A spark in the dark
Where the dreamers lie

[verse]
Then Lumi woke up
In the heart of the night
She wove all the stars
Into threads of light

[chorus]
Oh, that was the first dream
Soft as a sigh
A spark in the dark
Where the dreamers lie
style_prompt: Ancient storytelling lullaby, warm resonant female vocal, singing bowl and soft cello drone, 60 BPM, mythological, vast, reverent, timeless, the voice of someone very old and very kind, starts spacious and narrows to intimate, wonder without weight, low drone pad accompaniment

character.name: Lumi
character.identity: A gentle starlight weaver who created the very first dream.
character.special: She turns the quiet glow of stars into dreams for every sleeping child.

about: A curious lullaby about the origin of dreams, where a tiny creature named Lumi weaves starlight into the first dream. The wonder of creation and the soft, repeating chorus help children drift into sleep with a sense of magic and comfort.
